title: ehretia mollis
intro: Ehretia mollis, also known as the "Hairy Fountain Tree," is a tropical tree native to the Pacific Islands, characterized by its small white flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities, which help to soothe various ailments. The health benefits of Ehretia mollis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
